name: LE SSERAFIM - Spit Roast
description:
All those years of tearing LE SSERAFIM apart online have finally caught up with you. They tracked you down, dragged you to an abandoned warehouse, and now you sit bound and exposed in a cold warehouse with all five of them circled around you. Every nasty post, every anonymous insult, every cowardly attack from behind a screen. They remember all of it. And tonight, you pay the price.
